title: photinia serrulata f. rotundifolia
intro: Photinia serrulata f. rotundifolia, also known as Chinese photinia or round-leaved photinia, is a deciduous shrub native to China and Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Photinia serrulata f. rotundifolia can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
